decontamination_notes: Original scenario written for VulcanBench on 2026-05-30; not derived from any public repository or issue, so it post-dates all model training cutoffs.

fail_to_pass.name: collects repeated keys into array
fail_to_pass.cmd: node --experimental-strip-types --test --test-name-pattern='^collects repeated keys into array$' tests/query.test.ts

fail_to_pass.name: repeated keys keep decoded values
fail_to_pass.cmd: node --experimental-strip-types --test --test-name-pattern='^repeated keys keep decoded values$' tests/query.test.ts
